overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in western attire walking along a dirt trail through rolling grassy hills and pine forests, transitioning from sunny weather to a rainy riverside environment. A horse-drawn carriage passes by midway through the journey.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through open grassland with scattered trees

entered.detail: winding dirt path cutting through the grassy terrain
rolling green hills covered in tall grass
prominent rocky hill formation visible in the distance ahead
hazy mountain range on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding dirt trail through open grassy hills under a partly cloudy sky. Scattered trees dot the landscape while a large rock outcrop is visible in the distance ahead.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes from left to right on the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail through denser pine forest, approaching the rocky outcrop

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the trail from left to right, passing the character

entered.detail: dense evergreen trees lining both sides of the trail
large boulders and rocky outcrops appearing alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a denser pine forest as the large rock outcrop grows closer. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the trail, moving in the opposite direction, before the path continues toward the rocky area.

events.description: weather changes from sunny to overcast with rain beginning to fall
lighting darkens significantly as heavy rain sets in

agents.ego_description: walking downhill toward the river as rain begins to fall, navigating the rocky terrain

entered.detail: flowing river becoming visible along the right side of the path
steep rock face rising on the left side of the trail
massive rocks scattered along the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The weather suddenly changes as dark clouds bring rain. The character descends toward a rocky riverbank, with the river becoming visible to the right. The trail gives way to rocky terrain as the rainfall intensifies.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding trail that transforms from a sunny, open hillside into a rainy, rocky riverbank. It begins with the character walking through rolling grassy hills under a partly cloudy sky, moving toward a distant rock outcrop. As the path enters a denser pine forest, a horse-drawn carriage passes by in the opposite direction before the camera continues its approach toward the rocky terrain. The scene then shifts as dark clouds roll in and rain begins to fall, coinciding with the character's descent toward the water. Finally, the trail gives way to a rugged riverbank as the rainfall intensifies and the river becomes visible to the right.
